attempts.strategy: Planned Kan-extension route: presheaf Functor.lan along Opens(U)->Opens(X) + lanAdjunction, then PresheafOfModules.sheafification
attempts.insight: Not needed; restrictFunctor is defeq to a pushforward whose left adjoint already exists.

attempts.strategy: Identify restrictFunctor j with SheafOfModules.pushforward phi (defeq) and define j_! := SheafOfModules.pullback phi
attempts.insight: restrictFunctor_eq_pushforward is rfl; #print axioms = {propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}. Gotcha: unfold+infer_instance FAILS (higher-order unif blocks F.op ⋙ ?R); must give phi its proper Sheaf.Hom type via anonymous constructor (restrictionRingSheafHom).

next_steps: j_! infra complete. 1.2 next needs base-change (pullback ∘ j_! ≅ j_! ∘ pullback) + acyclicity Ext^q(j_!𝒪,F)≅H^q(U,F) via derived adjunction — both deeper, multi-iter.

attempts.strategy: Adjunction j_! ⊣ j^* = pullbackPushforwardAdjunction phi re-read through defeq restrictFunctor = pushforward phi
attempts.insight: Stated type extensionByZero j ⊣ restrictFunctor j holds by defeq. Added instances (extensionByZero j).IsLeftAdjoint and PreservesColimitsOfSize.{u,u} (extensionByZero j) — the 'commutes with direct sums' fact 1.2 needs.

next_steps: Sheaf-level IsRightAdjoint for pushforward fires from presheaf instance (small Opens sites) + HasWeakSheafify + WEqualsLocallyBijective. SAFT route (isRightAdjoint_of_preservesLimits) rejected: WellPowered/HasCoseparator/IsGrothendieckAbelian X.Modules all fail to synthesize.

findings.blocker: Needs base-change iso (pullback ∘ j_! ≅ j_! ∘ pullback) + derived acyclicity Ext^q_Y(g^*(j_!𝒪),F)=H^q(g⁻¹U,F); both multi-iter derived-category machinery, out of mathlib-build lane scope.
